title: Visible Durability!
description: Adds customizable durability tooltips to armor, tools and weapons
body:
**Visible Durability!** adds a simple durability display to Minecraft Beta.

When you hover an item, you’ll see a durability line directly under the item name. Works with anything that takes durability, including swords, armor, tools, and items like shears and flint & steel.

![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55a827faf2f1818ed1e5763432bdca096ec31c88.gif)

**Features**
- durability shown as current / max
- optional prefix: Durability
- change text color and boldness
- easy config (client-side)
  
**Required dependencies**
- Station API
- Glass Config API
- Glass Networking
